name: edgekit
description: Browser-native agent runtime for adding AI sidecars to web apps.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-skills build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-knowledge build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-governance build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-mcp build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-agui build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-ui build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-react build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-cli build && pnpm --filter @edgekit/ecommerce-demo build && pnpm --filter @edgekit/site build
scripts.test: vitest run && node scripts/check-core-banned-patterns.mjs && node scripts/check-demo-isolation.mjs && node scripts/check-v35-constraints.mjs
scripts.test:workflows: pnpm build && EDGEKIT_E2E_FRESH=1 playwright test tests/e2e/ecommerce.spec.ts tests/e2e/admin.spec.ts tests/e2e/docs.spec.ts
scripts.eval:models: pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-ui build && pnpm --filter @edgekit/ecommerce-demo build && node scripts/eval-model-cascade.mjs
scripts.research:full: node scripts/research-env.mjs && pnpm research:suite && pnpm research:quality && pnpm eval:adoption
scripts.pack:packages: pnpm build && mkdir -p research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/core pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/skills pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/knowledge pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/governance pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/mcp pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/agui pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/ui pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/react pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs && pnpm --dir packages/cli pack --pack-destination ../../research-results/package-smoke/packs
scripts.test:cloudflare-sidecar: pnpm --dir lab/proofs/cloudflare-sidecar build && pnpm --dir lab/proofs/cloudflare-sidecar wrangler:dry-run
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm build && pnpm --dir site dlx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name edgekit
